component.name: seznamds
component.summary: Directory of identifiers of Czech DataBoxes

description.p: This package provides an up-to-date directory of Czech DataBox (datová schránka) identifiers in XML format, sourced from the official mojedatovaschranka.cz portal.
The following data files are included:

ul.li: seznam_ds_ovm.xml — public authority bodies (orgány veřejné moci)

description.p: Data files are installed to /var/lib/seznamds/ and are suitable for use with applications that need to look up Czech DataBox identifiers, such as abraflexi-reminder.
